c.d: Number of platforms supported including desktop, mobile, and web interfaces
c.s: Official app stores, developer websites, platform compatibility matrices

c.d: Comprehensive scoring based on advanced features like linking, templates, databases, collaboration, multimedia support, and organization capabilities
c.s: App feature documentation, user reviews, feature comparison websites

c.d: Combined metric of download numbers, active user base, and community engagement
c.s: App store statistics, GitHub stars, community forums, social media presence

c.d: Quality of synchronization across devices and overall app performance including speed and stability
c.s: User reviews, technical benchmarks, support forum issues, performance testing

c.d: Ease of adoption for new users balanced with power user capabilities
c.s: User experience reviews, onboarding analysis, user feedback, usability studies
